Title: Valid Login
Description: Verify that a user can log in using valid standard credentials
Pre-conditions: User is on the login page
Test Steps: 1. Enter 'standard_user' in Username field \n2. Enter 'secret_sauce' in Password field \n3. Click Login button
Expected Result: User is redirected to Inventory page and Products header is visible

Title: Locked Out Login
Description: Verify that a locked out user fails to log in
Pre-conditions: User is on the login page
Test Steps: 1. Enter 'locked_out_user' in Username field \n2. Enter 'secret_sauce' in Password field \n3. Click Login button
Expected Result: Error message 'Epic sadface: Sorry this user has been locked out.' is displayed

Title: Complete Purchase Flow
Description: Verify end-to-end checkout flow for a single item
Pre-conditions: User is successfully logged in and is on Inventory page
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Add to cart' on 'Sauce Labs Backpack' 
2. Click shopping cart icon 
3. Click 'Checkout' on Cart page 
4. Enter 'John' in First Name 
5. Enter 'Doe' in Last Name 
6. Enter '12345' in Zip Code 
7. Click Continue 
8. Click Finish on overview page
Expected Result: Success message 'Thank you for your order!' is displayed and order is complete

Title: Sort Z to A
Description: Verify that products can be sorted by Name (Z to A)
Pre-conditions: User is successfully logged in and is on Inventory page
Test Steps: 1. Click the sort dropdown \n2. Select 'Name (Z to A)'
Expected Result: The products are re-rendered in reverse alphabetical order

Title: Sort Low to High
Description: Verify that products can be sorted by Price (low to high)
Pre-conditions: User is successfully logged in and is on Inventory page
Test Steps: 1. Click the sort dropdown \n2. Select 'Price (low to high)'
Expected Result: The products are re-rendered visually based on ascending price points
